_comment: CI quality-gate thresholds, measured on the REAL public-document eval corpus (data/eval/raw, 18 docs across 5 categories; data/eval/golden_qa.jsonl, 45 answerable + 10 unanswerable questions). Generation eval runs with evidence-gated abstention (--abstention-threshold 0.10). Floors (min) and the refusal-rate ceiling (max) sit with margin around the measured deterministic baseline (TF-IDF, no faiss, no rerank, extractive writer): hit_rate@k 1.0, mrr 1.0 (over the 45 answerable rows), faithfulness 0.594, grounded_rate 0.94, expected_coverage 0.795, answer_relevance 0.909, citation_coverage 0.705, refusal_rate 0.091, refusal_precision 1.0, refusal_recall 0.5. Retrieval is saturated because the corpus is lexically distinct; the discriminating gates are generation faithfulness and abstention precision/recall. Regenerate with: python -m adip.mlops.run_rag_eval --chunks data/processed/chunks.jsonl --index data/processed/vector_index --golden data/eval/golden_qa.jsonl --backend tfidf --no-faiss && python -m adip.mlops.run_generation_eval --index data/processed/vector_index --golden data/eval/golden_qa.jsonl --abstention-threshold 0.10
